case_title: COLONEL CHANEY III VS. TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANEY III, COLONEL AS TO DEFENDANT TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED OCT-05-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANEY III, COLONEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $17.26 INTEREST, $131.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $648.26, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $500.00 FOR WRONGFUL DEBITS PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 06/25/2018 AND COSTS. THE COURT INCLUDES THE EQUIVALENT OF A COURT CALL TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FEE IN LIEU OF PLAINTIFF'S FULL TRAVEL COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANEY III, COLONEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF COLONEL CHANEY III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALEC INGULSRUD. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CHANEY III, COLONEL AS TO DEFENDANT TURO LUXURY CAR RENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
